title: Phrasal Verbs
description: Master the essential multi-word verbs of English — verb + particle combinations — distinguishing literal from idiomatic meanings and separable from inseparable structures, with the most common B1 phrasal verbs in context.
sources: CEFR B1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Raymond Murphy, English Grammar in Use (Phrasal verbs — separable and inseparable)
